nodes.title: Clean Combo Directory
widgets_values:
import pathlib
base_path = pathlib.Path("/home/patricka/User/Development/AI/ComfyUI")
output_path = base_path / "output" / "Combo"
temp_path = base_path / "temp" / "Combo"
if not temp_path.is_dir():
    temp_path.mkdir(parents=True, exist_ok=True)

files = []
for p in output_path.iterdir():
    p.rename(temp_path / p.name)
    files.append(p.name)
asterr_result = files
